maintenance.hintDefault: Please try again later or contact your administrator.

system.pageDescription: Module maintenance, access control, and RBAC — separate from your personal profile.
system.emptyModulesDesc: The server did not return any module rows. Check API configuration or try again later.
system.upgradeHintLead: Finer-grained RBAC, org units, audit exports, and maintenance windows are planned. Use this page for module maintenance and access tools; personal permission overrides stay under Account → Access when enabled.
system.modulesLead: Enable to suspend a module for standard users. Roles listed in PPMS_MAINTENANCE_BYPASS_ROLES can still access the API and UI.
system.footnote: Changes apply immediately; the nav shows a maintenance label for everyone; bypass users can still enter the module.
system.defaultMaintMessage: This module is under maintenance. Please try again later.

kaizenPage.pageDescription: Continuous improvement, leaderboard, and weekly reminders.

innovationPage.pageDescription: Type 3 ideas — funnel Submitted → POC → Applied.

evaluationsPage.pageDescription: P1 / P2 / P3, peer review, and PDF export.

reportsPage.pageDescription: Weekly PDF, project CSV, and Kaizen impact summary.
reportsPage.noActions: You do not have permission to download reports or view exports on this page.

dashboard.pageDescription: Project overview, KPIs, Innovation funnel and projects needing attention.

exec.lead: Tracking {total} projects; {attention} need attention (at risk / delayed / blocked); portfolio task completion {completion}.
exec.detail: Workload: {openTasks} open tasks (not done); Innovation funnel (stage counts): {innovation}.
exec.presentHint: Larger KPIs and charts — ideal for projectors or screen sharing

board.chartByPmSub: Top PMs by project count — proxy for “by department” until org units exist

dashboard.reportSubtitle: PPMS · VA Schools — projects, KPIs and innovation

taskReport.chartHoursSub: Compare all tasks vs completed tasks
taskReport.chartCategorySub: Horizontal bars · top categories with a category set
taskReport.emptyProjects: No projects to bucket by progress.
taskReport.emptyCategory: No tasks with a category yet.

empty.projectTypes: No projects yet to show type distribution.

visual.kpiTrendEmpty: Run KPI snapshots to populate weekly points.

table.attentionEmpty: No at risk / delayed / blocked projects.
table.name: Name

teams.title: Teams
teams.subtitle: Create teams, add members, and scope KPI benchmarks to a team on the KPI page.
teams.createModalSubtitle: Pick a clear name and add an optional short description so everyone knows the purpose.
teams.namePlaceholder: e.g. PPMS Ops, Content team A…
teams.descriptionPlaceholder: Goals, scope of work, or internal notes…
teams.name: Team name
teams.creator: Created by
teams.editTeamSubtitle: Update the name and description shown to all members.
teams.searchPlaceholder: Type name or email (at least 2 characters)
teams.createdWithName: Team "{name}" was created. You can add members in the details below.
teams.createError: Could not create the team. Please try again.
teams.createErrorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
teams.createErrorValidation: Some fields are invalid. See details below.
teams.deleteConfirm: Delete team "{name}"? Members will be unlinked.
teams.removeConfirm: Remove this member from the team?
teams.treeLegend: Leader at the top; members branch below. Click the team name to open details.
teams.manageHint: Set team role, job title, and granular permissions for each member.
teams.perm_view_team_kpi: View KPI scoped to this team

kpiPage.scopeHint: Pick a team to compute percentile and histogram from that team’s members (you must belong to the team, or be admin/PM).
kpiPage.snapshotConfirm: Run the KPI snapshot for the current week? This writes data to the system.

projects.pageDescription: Project list: filter by team, type, phase, status, progress %, search, and sort; visual progress column (BR-PM).
projects.detailNotFound: Project not found (deleted or does not exist).
projects.confirmDuplicate: Duplicate this project? A new project will be created.
projects.fieldTeamHint: Optional: assign this project to a work team.
projects.fieldTeamLockedHint: You belong to only one team — the project is fixed to that team.
projects.createModalSubtitle: Fill in the essentials below. Fields marked with * are required.
projects.leaveCreateMessage: You have unsaved input. You can save a browser draft to continue later, or leave and discard changes.
projects.leaveEditMessage: You have unsaved changes. Closing will discard edits not yet saved with Save.
projects.draftBannerTitle: A saved draft exists in this browser
projects.draftSavedToast: Draft saved. Open «New project» again to continue.
projects.editModalSubtitle: Update details, phase, status, and member groups. Progress % is calculated from tasks.
projects.listGroupHint: Flat list for the current filters — use Type to focus on one project group.
projects.listGroupByCustomerHint: Grouped by department (Customer on the project); click a group header to collapse.
projects.createSectionInfoStatusLead: Project type, lifecycle phase, and overall status (aligned with Kanban / reports).
projects.createFieldTypeHint: Maintenance, delivery, or R&D — affects reporting and KPIs.
projects.createFieldPhaseHint: Planning / development / UAT / done / maintenance / R&D.
projects.createFieldStatusHint: On track / at risk / delayed / blocked — for prioritisation and signals.
projects.createFieldProgressReadonlyHint: Derived from tasks and the progress formula; change via tasks or Kanban.
projects.createSectionTeamLead: Owner is required; the two groups below are executors and followers (multi-select).
projects.createFieldCodePh: Auto on save: two letters from team name + number (e.g. AS-000001); no team → PRJ-000001
projects.createFieldCodeHint: The system assigns a code after creation; it cannot be edited here.
projects.createFieldEstimatedValueHint: Optional estimated value; editable when updating a project.
projects.createProgressCalc_average_task_pct: By average % progress of tasks in the project
projects.createProgressCalcHint_weighted_tasks: Example: tasks A (weight 40, 50% progress) and B (weight 30, 40%): [(40×50)+(30×40)] / (40+30) ≈ 45.71%.
projects.createProgressCalcRich_average_task_pct: Example: the project has tasks A and B. Task A is 40% done, task B is 60% done. Project progress = (40+60)/2 = 50%.
projects.createProgressCalcRich_time_proportion: Example: tasks A and B. Task A runs 4 days at 40% progress; task B runs 6 days at 50%. Project progress = ((4×40 + 6×50)/(4×100 + 6×100)) × 100 = 46%.
projects.createProgressCalcRich_weighted_tasks: Example: tasks A and B. Task A weight 40, progress 50%. Task B weight 30, progress 40%. Project progress = [(40×50)+(30×40)]/(40+30) = 45.71%.
projects.createExecutorsHint: Search by name or email, then tick who participates.
projects.createFollowersHint: Same pattern — followers receive updates only.
projects.createUserSearchMinHint: Type name or email (at least 1 character) to search people in the organization.
projects.createSectionStakeholdersLead: Pick department / block (stored on the project), or create new if missing.
projects.createPickVendorLead: Type to filter. Pick a row to append to the supplier field.
projects.createVendorSearchPh: Search by name or tax ID…
projects.createQuickVendorHint: Creates a minimal active vendor record. You can complete details on the Vendors page.
projects.createQuickVendorOk: Vendor created and added to the list.
projects.createQuickDepartmentLead: Departments are used as the customer / related unit on the project.
projects.createDeptCodePh: e.g. IT — leave empty if not used
projects.createQuickBlockLead: Blocks / partner groups linked to the project (per your org setup).
projects.createSectionPermissionsSub: Who can view or change this project (applied when the backend enforces presets).
projects.createSectionPermissionsUpgrade: Upgrade path: finer-grained roles, groups, and per-task rules will come in PPMS.
projects.permissionPresetOrgDesc: Use global policy (admin / PM / TL as configured).
projects.permissionPresetMembersDesc: Prioritise owner, executors, and followers (requires backend enforcement).
projects.permissionPresetOwnerDesc: Only the project owner; for sensitive projects (requires backend enforcement).
projects.createFieldAttachHint: Drag and drop here or use project documents after creation.
projects.confirmCreate: Create project with the entered data?
projects.timelineHint: Completion date per phase; current phase is highlighted from the project record.
projects.pdTasksBoardHint: List and timeline use the same filters.
projects.confirmTaskCreate: Create task with the entered data?
projects.confirmBulk: Apply bulk action to {n} selected task(s)?
projects.confirmDeleteTask: Delete task "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
projects.depConfirm: Add predecessor dependency for this task?
projects.pdPlaceholderSoon: This module is not configured in PPMS yet. Budget and vouchers can be connected later.
projects.pdJoinOk: You were added to stakeholder emails.
projects.pdCategoryHint: Use the Category field in the form below.
projects.pdProcessTaskHint: After creating the task, open it to add predecessor dependencies.
projects.pdPhaseTaskNoPhases: No custom phases yet — add phases first or pick one in the form.
projects.pdPhaseModalHint: Phases are stages within the project; tasks can be linked to a phase.
projects.pdBulkModalHint: Enter a name on each row; adjust hours and C×I per row.
projects.pdBulkEmpty: At least one row needs a task name.
projects.o1CodeHint: Code is suggested automatically when saved.
projects.o1StartHint: Start date is appended to the description (API stores a single deadline).
projects.o1ExtraNotSupported: Related objects, labels, attachments… will come in a later release.
projects.o1AdvancedHint: Fine-grained permission policies are being standardized.
projects.o1BulkIntro: Each row: title, owner/assignee notes, date range, hours, and phase.
projects.o1ErrPhaseEach: Each group must select a phase/category.
projects.o1ProcessCodeHint: Suggested code; you can edit before save.
projects.o1ProcessEmpty: No workflow selected — enter a name above.
projects.o1ErrProcess: Please enter the workflow to apply.
projects.o1ModalSubtitle: Fill in the details; * fields are required. For assignees / owners / followers: type to filter, click to add or remove.
projects.o1PhTasklist: Stage / task group (if different from phase)
projects.o1PhRelated: Links to contract, ticket, customer… (free text)
projects.o1MultiHint: Type to filter; click to add/remove multiple people.
projects.o1EstimateHoursHelp: Planned workload in hours for scheduling and capacity. This is not the same as the system “weight” from C and I below — that score ranks complexity and impact.
projects.o1ComplexityHelp: Scale 1–5: technical/contextual complexity (steps, technical risk, uncertainty). 1 = very simple, 5 = very complex.
projects.o1ImpactHelp: Scale 1–5: impact on project outcomes, users, or business. 1 = narrow scope, 5 = very high impact.
projects.o1ComputedWeightHint: System weight (0.4×C + 0.6×I) = {value} — stored for reporting; not a substitute for estimated hours.
projects.o1AttachHint: Select one or more files; they upload after the task is created successfully.
projects.o1RestrictSubtask: Keep subtask dates within parent range
projects.pdSuppliesHint: Track supplies / materials for this project.
projects.pdDocsHint: Create folders to organize files in the project; add web links or upload files to the server (Open on uploaded files = download).
projects.pdDocsEmpty: No folders or files yet. Add a folder, web link, or upload.
projects.pdDocsConfirmDelete: Remove this item and everything inside (if a folder)?
projects.pdDocsUploadConfirm: Upload this file to project documents?
projects.pdReportTableHint: Grouped by assignee. Open tasks: on-time vs overdue by due date. Done: on-time if last update ≤ due date (completion proxy).
projects.pdEmptyFinanceDesc: Add an estimated project value or record hours on tasks to track.
projects.pdEmptyReportsDesc: Add tasks and assignees to see the personnel matrix.
projects.pdEmptySuppliesDesc: Record supplies used for this project.
projects.pdReportFinanceFootnote: Full finance detail will integrate when the accounting module is ready.
projects.pdReportSuppliesHint: Same data as the Supplies tab — quick view here.
projects.pdMediaIntro: Use the tabs below (project library or task files), or search by name.
projects.pdAttachSearchHint: Filtering by keyword across all project documents. Clear search to browse by folder.
projects.pdAttachIntoFolderHint: Adds into the open folder (see path above).
projects.pdAttachFolderEmpty: This folder is empty. Add a subfolder, link, or upload files.
projects.pdAttachFolderClickHint: Click a folder to preview its contents beside the list. Double-click to open it.
projects.pdAttachFolderCardTitle: Click to preview · Double-click to open
projects.pdAttachPreviewPlaceholder: Select a folder to see subfolders and files here.
projects.pdAttachPreviewMissing: This folder could not be found.
projects.pdAttachFileClickHint: Click a file to preview beside the list. Double-click to download.
projects.pdAttachFilePreviewError: Could not load this file for preview.
projects.pdAttachFilePreviewUnsupported: No inline preview for this type. Use Download.
projects.pdAttachFilePreviewNoUrl: No URL is set for this link.
projects.pdMediaSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, path, or task…
projects.pdAttachEmptyStateHint: Drag and drop a file onto the area below or use Upload to add to the project library. Task attachments appear here when files are added on each task.
projects.pdAttachEmptyFilteredHint: Try another tab or clear the search box.
projects.pdAttachDropzoneHint: Drop a file here or choose a file to browse.
projects.pdAttachDropzoneInlineHint: Drop or choose a file (into the current folder).
projects.pdAttachEmptyReadonly: You have view-only access — contact a project admin to add files.
projects.pdAttachEmptyTasksHint: Attach files on each task in the Tasks tab; they will show up here.
projects.pdMediaSummaryHint: Manage folders, web links, and files on the Attachments tab; quick summary here.
projects.pdMediaNoRecentItems: No recent documents or attachments yet.
projects.pdToastJoin: Access is managed by project roles in PPMS.
projects.pdToastGroup: Task grouping is not available in this build.
projects.kanbanDragHint: Drag a card to another column to change phase (PM / Team Lead / Admin).
projects.kanbanPaginationHint: Showing {shown} of {total} projects (paged). Use page controls or filters to see more.
projects.labelsFilterHint: Pick or type an exact label (must match stored data).
projects.labelsBulkNeedSelection: Select at least one project in the list.
projects.importPreviewHint: CSV: up to 100 data rows; first row must be headers (delimiter auto: comma or semicolon). JSON: use a top-level array of objects, or an object with a "projects" property whose value is that array — same fields as CSV. New project: leave project_id empty; require name, type, and owner_id or owner_email. Update: set project_id and columns to change. Column labels: multiple labels separated by | or comma, or a JSON array.
projects.importCommitConfirm: Apply {n} valid row(s) (create/update)? Each change is audit-logged.
projects.importPreviewExpired: Validation session expired. Choose the file and validate again.
projects.exportNeedSelection: Select at least one project on the current page.
projects.columnPickerHint: Name and Actions always stay on.
projects.tableEmpty: No projects match the current filters.
projects.upgradeIdea1: Save filters as named views with shareable deep links (query string).
projects.upgradeIdea2: Export CSV/PDF from the table using the active filters.
projects.upgradeIdea3: Bulk actions: change owner / phase / archive with confirmation and audit log.
projects.upgradeIdea4: Deadline column with colour cues (due soon, overdue).
projects.upgradeIdea5: Owner picker (dropdown) instead of raw user id.
projects.bulkConfirm: Update {n} selected project(s)? Changes are audit-logged.
projects.bulkNeedField: Choose at least one change: owner, phase, or archive.
projects.bulkDeleteHint: Deletes {n} project(s) and all related tasks. Cannot be undone.
projects.bulkDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete {n} selected project(s)? All tasks will be removed. This is audit-logged.
projects.inlineEditConfirm: Save changes to this project row?

login.cardLeadGoogle: Sign in with the school email account provided by Vietnam America Schools.
login.ackShort: I confirm I have read and agree to follow system use rules before signing in.
login.useEmail: Sign in with email and password
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: PPMS · Project & performance management
login.securityDesc: Access to PPMS follows internal acceptable-use policies and information security management (ISMS) practices aligned with ISO/IEC 27001:2022. Where payment card data is handled, industry PCI DSS requirements apply.
login.refPci: What is PCI DSS — Blue Jay PMS
login.ackLabel: I confirm I have read and agree to comply with system use rules and related information-security practices before signing in.
login.securityRequired: Please check the confirmation box before signing in.
login.rememberMe: Keep me signed in on this device
login.rememberHint: Uncheck on shared computers — session is tied to the browser tab.
login.mfaDesc: We sent a 6-digit code to your email. Enter it to finish signing in.
login.rateLimitHint: Too many attempts. Wait a few seconds and try again.
login.googleFailed: Google sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
login.googleNoEmail: This Google account has no public email.
login.googleNoAccount: This Google email is not on the system. Contact your administrator or use email and password.
login.googleAccountMismatch: This email is linked to a different Google account.
login.googleDomainNotAllowed: This Google email’s domain is not allowed for sign-in. Contact IT if needed.
login.googleStartErr: Could not start Google sign-in (check server configuration).
login.googleExchangeErr: Google sign-in link is invalid or has expired.

profile.pageDescription: Profile, security, devices, access & delegation, and activity.
profile.saveError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
profile.accessTabLead: Role → personal permission matrix → delegation. RBAC tools: «Admin» tab.
profile.accessRolePermissionAdminLocked: Permission-admin roles cannot be changed here — server/database changes are required.
profile.confirmDelegationAdd: Create this delegation with the selected options?
profile.rbacAdminAssignRestrictedHint: Privileged permission-admin roles cannot be assigned from the UI — only standard roles.
profile.rbacAdminTargetIsPermissionAdmin: This user has a permission-admin role — their role cannot be changed here.
profile.rbacAdminConfirmMatrixSave: Save the system permission matrix for role «{role}»?
profile.accessReadOnlyBannerTitle: Read-only — you cannot change system permissions for others
profile.accessReadOnlyBannerSummary: Your account is not in the permission-admin group on the server (this is separate from being an “admin” in everyday language).
profile.accessReadOnlyDetailsToggle: Technical details & how to request access
profile.permissionAdminExplain: Your PPMS role is «{role}». Only these roles may edit the permission matrix, change other users’ PPMS roles, and manage delegation as an admin: {roles}. If you need this, ask a system admin to update the users.role field or set PPMS_RBAC_ADMIN_ROLES on the server.
profile.accessRoleLead: Your role sets the baseline for what you can do. New accounts often default to Developer until an admin assigns another role.
profile.accessRoleNoteDefault: New accounts and Google sign-in often get the Developer role in the database by default — that is a technical default, not a display bug.
profile.accessRoleUserHint: You can still view the matrix; you cannot change roles. Contact your admin if you need permission-admin access.
profile.accessRoleNoRoleOptions: No roles are configured on the server — contact support.
profile.accessRoleAdminHint: Assign roles and the system matrix under the «RBAC admin» tab. Permission-admin roles cannot be changed on this profile page.
profile.accessDelegatorRoleLead: Change this user’s role while you manage their delegations.
profile.rbacAdminSectionIntro: Step 1: assign a PPMS role to any user. Step 2: edit the baseline matrix per role (applies to everyone with that role).
profile.rbacAdminAssignHint: Type a name or email, pick a user from the list, choose a role, then save.
profile.rbacAdminRoleMatrixLead: Set the baseline permissions for each role (everyone with that role). Stored in the database; “Reset to defaults” removes custom rows and uses config files again.
profile.rbacAdminResetConfirm: Remove custom matrix rows from the database and use configuration defaults for this role?
profile.rbacAdminCustomRolesHint: Roles with a custom matrix in the database: {roles}
profile.rbacAdminAssignUserLead: Find a user, pick their new role, save.
profile.accessSectionPermHint: Per module and action (View / Create / Edit / Delete). Admins may override and Save.
profile.delegationIntro: Delegatees can act for you within the chosen scope; you can revoke anytime.
profile.delegationIntroAdmin: Delegatees can act for you within the chosen scope; revoke when needed. Pick a delegator to configure another user’s delegations. To change their PPMS role (non–permission-admin roles only), use the card below the banner when shown.
profile.emailReadonly: Email is your sign-in identifier (not editable here).
profile.avatarDrop: Drag & drop or click to choose
profile.canManageHint: Only permission-admin roles (per server config) can edit overrides.

contracts.pageDescription: Vendor agreements, approvals, installments, and files.
contracts.filterBarSubtitle: Narrow the list by status, organization, and end date.
contracts.vendorFilterHint: No vendors yet — they appear after you create contracts.
contracts.exportCsvHint: Up to 5,000 rows with current filters
contracts.emptyHint: Try clearing filters or create a new contract.
contracts.modalCreateSubtitle: Enter contract details. You may attach scans/PDFs; files upload after the contract is saved.
contracts.attachHint: Up to {max} files, {sizeMb} MB each. Images, PDFs, and office documents.
contracts.attachMaxFiles: You can add at most {max} files.
contracts.attachUploadPartialFail: {n} file(s) failed to upload. Retry on the contract detail page.
contracts.attachUploadPartialFailOne: 1 file failed to upload. Retry on the contract detail page.
contracts.fieldFollowerHint: Optional. The person who monitors this contract (can differ from the creator). Search by name or email.
contracts.followerSearchAria: Search user to assign as contract follower
contracts.quickVendorHint: Creates a vendor record and fills the vendor name on this contract form.
contracts.quickVendorCreated: Vendor created. You can continue with the contract.
contracts.lookupEmpty: No departments — run DepartmentSeeder or add departments in the database.
contracts.deletedToTrash: The contract was moved to trash. An administrator can restore it or delete it permanently.
contracts.trashSubtitle: Soft-deleted contracts. Only administrators can open this view.
contracts.trashRestoreConfirm: Restore this contract to the active list?
contracts.trashForceDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete this contract and related records? This cannot be undone.
contracts.submitHint: Select approvers in order (search by name or email).
contracts.detailIntro: Parties, term, and scope at a glance. Use tabs for payments, files, and approvals.
contracts.detailNotFound: Contract not found or you do not have access.
contracts.paymentsTabIntro: Scheduled installments. Status updates when marked paid.
contracts.filesTabIntro: Attachments (scans, PDFs). Download to open the stored copy.
contracts.approvalsTabIntro: Read top to bottom: each step is one approver in order. The active step is highlighted; if it is your turn, use the buttons beside that step.
contracts.approvalYourTurnNudge: You are the next approver for this contract.
contracts.approvalYourTurnBody: Use the two buttons next to the highlighted step below: Approve to continue the flow, or Reject to return the contract to draft.
contracts.approvalQueuedHint: This step starts after the previous steps are approved.
contracts.logsTabIntro: Audit trail of actions on this contract.
contracts.submitModalHint: Choose who will approve, in order. Search by name or email and add each person.
contracts.approverPickerHint: Search, then click a user to add. The list order is the approval sequence. Use × on a chip to remove.
contracts.approverAriaSearch: Search users to add as approvers
contracts.approverEmpty: No users match. Try another name or email.
contracts.paymentsMarkPaidInactive: Installments can be marked paid only when the contract is active. Finish approval and activate the contract first.
contracts.versionCompareHint: Pick two versions to compare notes and upload time.
contracts.paymentModalHint: Enter the amount paid in VND (you can pay the full remaining balance or part of it). Optionally attach a receipt or transfer proof.
contracts.paymentProofHint: Receipt, bank slip, or screenshot — same limits as contract file uploads.
contracts.paymentAmountInvalid: Enter a valid amount greater than zero.
contracts.paymentAmountTooHigh: Amount cannot exceed the remaining balance for this installment.
contracts.deleteConfirmAdmin: Move this contract to trash (any status)? You can restore it from Trash if needed.
contracts.submitConfirm: Submit this contract for approval with the listed approvers?

vendors.pageDescription: Active suppliers, research pipeline, scoring, reviews, and lifecycle timeline.
vendors.modalCreateHint: Enter the name and choose the vendor type and initial status. You can add details after creating the record.
vendors.filterOfferingsHint: Searches supply solutions and services offered. Each term must match (may be in different fields).
vendors.searchHistoryHint: Click to re-apply name and solutions & services keywords.
vendors.detailContactHint: Primary contacts: name, email, phone, or channel notes for your team.
vendors.editModeBannerOverview: You are editing Overview (legal, contact, risk, departments). Save applies only to this section.
vendors.editModeBannerBusiness: You are editing Business (industry, values, criteria, departments). Save applies only to this section.
vendors.editModeBannerHint: Changes apply when you click Save. Fields marked * are required where shown.
vendors.formSectionBizCriteriaHint: Per-criterion scores; the system may aggregate into the overall vendor score.
vendors.detailLegalNamePlaceholder: Company name as on contract / registration…
vendors.detailLegalNameHint: Match invoice or contract name when applicable.
vendors.detailInternalNotePlaceholder: Internal notes only (not shared with vendor)…
vendors.detailIndustryHint: Industry or segment for filtering and reporting.
vendors.detailMainProductsPlaceholder: Type an item, press Enter to add a tag…
vendors.detailMainProductsHint: No commas needed — one tag per item; pasting comma-separated text splits into tags.
vendors.detailContractValueHint: Total contract value or committed amount.
vendors.detailResearchSourceHint: How you discovered or vetted the vendor.
vendors.detailFitScoreHint: How well the vendor fits your needs.
vendors.detailProsPlaceholder: Strengths when working with this vendor…
vendors.detailDepartmentsHint: Pick one or more departments from the list.
vendors.deptLookupEmpty: No departments available in the system.
vendors.timelineActorHint: Optional. Type at least 2 characters to search PPMS users, then pick from the list.
vendors.timelineNotePlaceholder: Short summary of discussion or outcome…
vendors.timelineNoteHint: What happened, decisions, or follow-ups (visible to your team).
vendors.timelinePhaseHint: Pick the stage that matches real progress.
vendors.timelineWhenHint: Local time on your device; stored in system format.
vendors.reviewFormHint: Internal review after engaging with the vendor.
vendors.reviewRatingHint: Tap a star (1–5). Your score appears below.
vendors.reviewRatingStarsGroup: Choose a rating from 1 to 5 stars
vendors.reviewBodyHint: Include context: contract, phase, and criteria you judged against.
vendors.detailServicesOfferedPlaceholder: Type a service, press Enter to add a tag…
vendors.detailServicesOfferedHint: Shown as a list in the overview. Pasting comma-separated text splits into tags.
vendors.overviewFeaturesHint: Features & capability — standout modules. Edit below: Enter to add each tag.
vendors.overviewServicesHint: Delivery & operations services. Enter to add tags.
vendors.contractsTabIntro: These contracts reference this vendor. Status and dates help you see what is active without opening each file.
vendors.reviewSummaryHint: One line for the list view, e.g. “Q1 renewal negotiation”.
vendors.reviewDimensionsIntro: Rate 1–5 for each dimension, or leave unset. They complement the overall score.
vendors.reviewRecommendHint: Would you choose this vendor again for similar needs?
vendors.userPickerNoResults: No users match. Try another name or email.
vendors.timelineAddIntro: Record a milestone: phase, time, who was involved, and a short note. Times use your browser’s local clock and are stored in UTC.
vendors.timelineEmpty: No timeline events. Add stages as the relationship progresses.
vendors.timelinePickTime: Select date and time for this event.
vendors.deleteVendorConfirm: Delete this vendor? This cannot be undone if there are no contracts.

activityFeed.pageDescription: Project and contract audit trail with filters and read state.
activityFeed.markedAll: All matching items marked as read.
activityFeed.noFieldDiff: No field-level diff captured for this entry.
activityFeed.loadError: Could not load activity. Try again in a moment.
